inline fun <reified T : Any> get(
        qualifier: Qualifier? = null,
        noinline parameters: ParametersDefinition? = null,
    ): T = scopeRegistry.rootScope.get(qualifier, parameters)

fun pop(): Segment? {
  val result = if (next !== this) next else null
  prev!!.next = next
  next!!.prev = prev
  next = null
  prev = null
  return result
}

fun push(segment: Segment): Segment {
  segment.prev = this
  segment.next = next
  next!!.prev = segment
  next = segment
  return segment
}
